mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO kline (symbol, interval_type, open_time, open, high, low, close, volume, close_time) VALUES (#{symbol}, #{intervalType}, #{openTime}, #{open}, #{high}, #{low}, #{close}, #{volume}, #{closeTime})

INSERT IGNORE INTO kline (symbol, interval_type, open_time, open, high, low, close, volume, close_time) VALUES
(#{k.symbol}, #{k.intervalType}, #{k.openTime}, #{k.open}, #{k.high}, #{k.low}, #{k.close}, #{k.volume}, #{k.closeTime})
